rationale.fidelity: Keeps realized demand exogenous, order quantities controllable, and the robust guarantee explicitly confined to the chosen uncertainty set.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete procurement actor, timing, decisions, stakes, conservatism trade-off, and smaller-budget counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Correctly avoids unsupported novelty and contribution claims but supplies no literature relationship.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly labels calibration as missing and limits resilience claims to modeled set coverage and specified penalties.
rationale.prose_clarity: Comprehensive but overlong, with repeated diagnostics and visible encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A complete and faithful robust-optimization framing with excellent state and boundary discipline; verbosity limits presentation quality.
